Walk them through: 1) honest talk (most lose money), 2) pick testnet exchange, 3) set one simple strategy, 4) run on paper, 5) watch trades & understand, 6) only THEN consider real money with their own choice.

Walk them: 1) confirm wallet address, 2) pick chain to practice on, 3) claim from faucet (public address only, never backup words), 4) see transaction in wallet, 5) build local list of working faucets, 6) name the win.
